zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Paulet II於1426年出生在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛時，他的父親Sir John Paulet27歲，母親Lady Constance Poynings18歲。他和Eleanor de Ros至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1492年10月5日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Paulet II于1426年出生在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛时，他的父亲Sir John Paulet27岁，母亲Lady Constance Poynings18岁。他和Eleanor de Ros至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1492年10月5日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Paulet II was born in 1426, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir John Paulet, was 27 and his mother, Lady Constance Poynings, was 18. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Eleanor de Ros. He died on 5 October 1492, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Paulet II est né en 1426, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paulet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Constance Poynings, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Eleanor de Ros. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1492, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.Basing, Hampshire, England: Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Paulet II 1426 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Paulet 27 und seine Mutter Lady Constance Poynings 18. Er hatte mit Eleanor de Ros mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Oktober 1492 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Basing, Hampshire, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Eleanor de Ros. Morì il 5 ottobre 1492, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Paulet IIが1426年にイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで生まれた時，父Sir John Pauletは27歳，母Lady Constance Poyningsは18歳であった。彼はEleanor de Rosとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1492年10月5日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Paulet II(이)가 1426년 영국 함프실르 드 바징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Paulet(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Constance Poynings(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Eleanor de Ros(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 10월 5일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 드 바징에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Paulet II nasceu em 1426, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paulet, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Constance Poynings, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Eleanor de Ros. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1492, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Basing, Hampshire, England: Old Basing, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Paulet II родился в 1426 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Paulet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Constance Poynings, 18. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Eleanor de Ros. Он умер 5 октября 1492 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия.
